findings.reason: execution price adverse to benchmark by more than 5.0 bps
execution price adverse to benchmark by more than 25.0 bps (material)
fill rate below policy minimum 0.9 for an evaluated order type
explicit + implicit cost exceeds 30.0 bps of notional
executed on a venue not in the effective approved-venue list
manual/exception route flagged with no documented rationale reference

fp_checks: benchmark source/timestamp: confirm the arrival benchmark (NBBO/EBBO/arrival mid) matches the order's decision time and market convention
order type & client instruction: a limit or client-directed order may legitimately show partial fills or off-touch prices
market conditions: volatility, auctions, halts, or thin liquidity can widen spreads within policy
venue list version: verify the execution venue against the approved-venue list effective on the trade date
documented exception: check the OMS/EMS annotation and communications archive for a rationale before treating an exception as undocumented
order size & working strategy: large or illiquid orders may be worked over time by design
disclaimer: Best-execution review evidence only; not a best-execution or compliance determination. No case has been closed, no exception has been dispositioned, no filing has been made, and no system of record has been updated.
narrative: Best-execution review of 8 US-Equities executions for the period ending 2026-07-15 fired 7 finding types and is suggested for Escalate for the best-execution committee. Two executions (X-002, X-003) show adverse price deviation versus the arrival benchmark; X-003 is material at 40 bps and also exceeds the cost cap. One execution (X-004) exceeded the latency ceiling, one (X-005) routed to a venue outside the approved list, one (X-006) is a manual exception with no documented rationale on file, and one market order (X-007) filled at 70%. Before the committee weighs these, run the listed false-positive checks (benchmark timing, order instructions, market conditions, venue-list version, and the exception annotation). This pack is cited evidence for human adjudication only. Best-execution review evidence only; not a best-execution or compliance determination. No case has been closed, no exception has been dispositioned, no filing has been made, and no system of record has been updated.
